props.heading: Welcome to Albata
props.subheading: Modern Web Platform with Advanced SEO & Security

props.content:
# Why Choose Albata?

- **SEO Optimized**: Entity-based SEO with structured data
- **JSON Pages**: Component-driven page design
- **Security First**: Advanced security headers and validation
- **Developer Friendly**: TypeScript, Zod validation, and DX tools

props.heading: Ready to Get Started?
props.description: Explore our products and see what Albata can do for you.

items.a: Entity-based SEO focuses on topics and concepts rather than just keywords, helping search engines understand the context and relationships between different entities.

items.q: How does JSON page design work?
items.a: Pages are defined as JSON files that specify component order and props, which are then rendered by a safe component registry with validation.
Yes, Albata includes advanced security features like CSP headers, rate limiting, input validation, and audit logging.

props.title: Stay Updated
props.description: Get the latest updates about Albata features and improvements.
